subtitles.original: お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please check it out!

subtitles.original: そして皆様待望の、お知らせがございます！
subtitles.english: And now, I have an announcement you've all been waiting for!

subtitles.original: こちら！
subtitles.english: Look at this!

subtitles.original: なんと、輪堂千緋世、ソロとして初めてのオリ曲「Flatout」が、
subtitles.english: Believe it or not, Chihaya Rindo's first-ever solo original song, "Flatout"...

subtitles.original: このあと24時、7月9日木曜日の0時、
subtitles.english: ...will be released digitally after this at midnight! That's 12:00 AM on Thursday, July 9th.

subtitles.original: このあとね、3時間ちょい後くらいからデジタルリリースされます！
subtitles.english: That's in just over three hours from now!

subtitles.original: やったー！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: 今回のライブのタイトルにもなっている「Flatout」は、オリ曲のタイトルでございました！
subtitles.english: "Flatout," which is also the title of this live stream, was actually the title of my original song!

subtitles.original: えー、この配信が終わった後にMVが公開されますので、そちらもぜひお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: The music video will be released right after this stream ends, so please look forward to that as well!

subtitles.original: 概要欄にね、のちのち多分リンクが貼られたり貼られなかったりすると思うのでそちらもチェックしてみてください。
subtitles.english: I think the link will eventually be added to the description, so please check that too.

subtitles.original: 新曲、このあとやっぱ早速聴きたいですよね！
subtitles.english: I'm sure you all want to hear the new song right away!

subtitles.original: このあと披露するので絶対に聴いてください。
subtitles.english: I'll be performing it right after this, so make sure to listen to it!

subtitles.original: 最後まで、最後までね、チャンネルはそのままで、見ていってくださいね。
subtitles.english: Please stay tuned until the very end without changing the channel!

subtitles.original: 以上、輪堂千緋世生誕祭2026のグッズ情報と、リリース情報でした！
subtitles.english: And that's all for the merchandise and release announcements for Chihaya Rindo's Birthday Festival 2026!

subtitles.original: みんな買ってね、サブスクでも聴いてね！
subtitles.english: Everyone, please buy it and listen on streaming services too!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Alright!

subtitles.original: ということで、怒涛のお知らせコーナーでした。ここからいよいよライブもクライマックスです。でも、まだまだあります！
subtitles.english: And that wraps up our whirlwind announcement corner. From here, the live show finally heads into the climax. But we're not done yet!

subtitles.original: 盛り上がる準備できてますか？最後一緒にぶち上げていこうね！
subtitles.english: Are you ready to get hyped? Let's go crazy together at the end!

subtitles.original: では、準備してきます。そのチャンネルはそのままで。
subtitles.english: Well then, I'm going to get ready. Stay tuned on this channel!

subtitles.original: I wanna fly so high Yeah, I know my wings are dried
subtitles.english: I wanna fly so high, Yeah, I know my wings are dried

subtitles.original: 「翼仰げば」って人は云う
subtitles.english: "Raise your wings," people say

subtitles.original: その向こうにあるは無情
subtitles.english: But it's only heartless beyond

subtitles.original: 飛べる者 落ちる者
subtitles.english: Ones who fly, ones who fall

subtitles.original: 誰も見てない
subtitles.english: People pay no attention

subtitles.original: 気にも留めない
subtitles.english: They don't care at all

subtitles.original: それでも飛び続けた
subtitles.english: But I kept on flying

subtitles.original: 傷ついた言葉乗せ
subtitles.english: Just wanted to put the hurt

subtitles.original: 運ぶたいから
subtitles.english: And bring them away

subtitles.original: 追いかけて届くよう
subtitles.english: Chase, we'll make it there

subtitles.original: 僕等一心に羽ばたいて
subtitles.english: Forcing our wings to flutter

responses.thoughts:
**Comprehensive Subtitle Generation Plan**

Alright, as a seasoned professional in this field, I've got a solid plan forming. My task is to produce precise subtitles for a Japanese YouTube video featuring Vtuber Chihaya Rindo, differentiating between her speech and singing. This requires meticulous timing and accurate translation.

Here's my approach: First, I will segment the video, separating Chihaya's spoken parts from the musical sections. For her speech, I'll transcribe her Japanese utterances (`og`), and provide equally fluent English translations (`en`), ensuring the start and end times are impeccable. The initial announcement section (00:00.000 - 01:07.000) will be handled with particular care.

After that, for the song "Wataridori" by [Alexandros], beginning around 01:31.000, I'll integrate the provided lyrics, aligning them precisely with the audio using the available JSON lyrics data. Timing is the key here; I need the lyrics' timestamps to be spot-on, right down to the millisecond, matching up with the start and end points of each phrase.

Here's what I've got so far:

*   00:00.000 - 00:01.200: "お願いします！" -> "Please check it out!"
*   00:01.200 - 00:05.100: "そして皆様待望の、お知らせがございます！" -> "And now, I have an announcement you've all been waiting for!"
*   00:06.600 - 00:07.700: "こちら！" -> "Look at this!"
*   00:07.700 - 00:14.100: "なんと、輪堂千緋世、ソロとして初めてのオリ曲「Flatout」が、" -> "Believe it or not, Chihaya Rindo's first-ever solo original song, 'Flatout'..."
*   00:14.100 - 00:18.000: "このあと24時、7月9日木曜日の0時、" -> "...will be released digitally after this at midnight! That's 12:00 AM on Thursday, July 9th."
*   00:18.000 - 00:23.500: "このあとね、3時間ちょい後くらいからデジタルリリースされます！" -> "That's in just over three hours from now!"
*   00:23.500 - 00:26.500: "やったー！" -> "Yay!"
*   00:26.500 - 00:33.200: "今回のライブのタイトルにもなっている「Flatout」は、オリ曲のタイトルでございました！" -> "'Flatout,' which is also the title of this live stream, was actually the title of my original song!"
*   00:33.200 - 00:40.800: "えー、この配信が終わった後にMVが公開されますので、そちらもぜひお楽しみに！" -> "The music video will be released right after this stream ends, so please look forward to that as well!"
*   00:40.800 - 00:46.800: "概要欄にね、のちのち多分リンクが貼られたり貼られなかったりすると思うのでそちらもチェックしてみてください。" -> "I think the link will eventually be added to the description, so please check that too."
*   00:46.800 - 00:50.000: "新曲、このあとやっぱ早速聴きたいですよね！" -> "I'm sure you all want to hear the new song right away!"
*   00:50.000 - 00:52.500: "このあと披露するので絶対に聴いてください。" -> "I'll be performing it right after this, so make sure to listen to it!"
*   00:52.500 - 00:57.000: "最後まで、最後までね、チャンネルはそのままで、見ていってくださいね。" -> "Please stay tuned until the very end without changing the channel!"
*   00:57.000 - 01:02.500: "以上、輪堂千緋世生誕祭2026
